Class DiscussionPost

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.DiscussionPost
public class DiscussionPost extends Object

Title: DiscussionPost Class

Description: Represents a single post in the unified discussion board. A post is either a text post (type = "text") or an image post (type = "image"). Image posts carry a JavaFX Image and the original filename; text posts leave those null. All posts may be marked as pinned via the isPinned flag.

Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025

Version:
1.00 2026-06-22 Initial version, 2.00 2026-06-23 Added isPinned field for unified board
Author:
Weiye (Richard) Zhang

  • Constructor Details

    • DiscussionPost

      public DiscussionPost(int id, String author, String title, String body, String postType, String imageFilename, javafx.scene.image.Image image, String createdAt, String tags)

      Method: DiscussionPost

      Description: Full constructor used by Database.getAllPosts().

      Parameters:
      id - specifies the primary key from the posts table
      author - specifies the username of the poster
      title - specifies the post title or image caption
      body - specifies the body text (null for image posts)
      postType - specifies "text" or "image"
      imageFilename - specifies the original filename (null for text posts)
      image - specifies the decoded JavaFX Image (null for text posts)
      createdAt - specifies the timestamp string from H2
      tags - specifies the tags for post

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns:
      the post's primary key

    • getAuthor

      public String getAuthor()
      Returns:
      the username of the author

      public String getTitle()
      Returns:
      the post title or image caption

    • getBody

      public String getBody()
      Returns:
      the body text, or null for image posts

      public String getTags()
      Returns:
      the tags

    • getPostType

      public String getPostType()
      Returns:
      "text" or "image"

    • getImageFilename

      public String getImageFilename()
      Returns:
      the original image filename, or null for text posts

    • getImage

      public javafx.scene.image.Image getImage()
      Returns:
      the decoded JavaFX Image, or null for text posts

    • getCreatedAt

      public String getCreatedAt()
      Returns:
      H2 timestamp string

    • isImagePost

      public boolean isImagePost()
      Returns:
      true if this is an image post
